name: Hild
description: An engineering genius from a young age. ~!Hild seeks revenge against Thorfinn after the death of her father.!~

name: Haru Nonaka
description: __Height:__ 153 cm A high school dropout because her school didn't approve of her working at Milk Hall, a cafe and bar, since they serve alcohol in the evening. She has feelings for Rikuo and frequently visits him at his part time job at the convenience store. Often seen with her pet crow, Kansuke.

name: Kojirou
description: Kojirou is a member of the Rocket Gang, more specifically part of a trio with Musashi and Nyarth, that follows Satoshi and his friends around in the Pocket Monsters anime, usually trying to steal Satoshi's Pikachu.

name: Marine Houshou

name: Yomiko Readman
description: Yomiko is a bespectacled substitute teacher and an introvert. A Bibliophile, she prefers to bury herself in her books. She spends almost all of her income on books, and her "apartment" is stacked floor to ceiling with books. She resides somewhere in Jinbocho, a neighborhood of Chiyoda, Tokyo known for numerous bookstores. Though in appearance Japanese, she is in fact half-Japanese, half-English.
age: 25 (Read or Die and Read or Die OVA), 30 (R.O.D The TV)

name: Diamond
description: **Hardness**: 10 One of the gems who mainly does patrol duty. They're partners with [Bort](https://anilist.co/character/123389/Bort). Despite Diamond's high offensive power, their toughness is second-rate and easily broken. The other gems consider them lovely and a top fashion model. Diamond is friendly, kind, and gentle. name: Mikan Tsumiki
description: __Height:__ 165cm (5'4") __Talent:__ Ultimate Nurse A student of Hope's Peak Academy's Class 77-B, and a participant of the Killing School Trip featured in _Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair_.

name: Reina Aharen
description: A small, timid, and unfathomable girl who grows attached to Raidou after he begins talking to her. She has a bad sense of distance. ~!She eventually confesses her love to Raido.!~

name: Dorothy
description: An undercover student. She is actually 20 years old and acts as a leader to the spies. She is good at shooting, seducing and driving vehicles.

name: Sajuna Inui
description: A famous cosplayer that [Marin Kitagawa](https://anilist.co/character/133676) looks up to. Her younger sister is [Shinju](https://anilist.co/character/207937/Shinju-Inui).

name: Stephanie Dola
nativeName: ステファニー・ドーラ
description: __Race:__ Imanity Stephanie is expressive and emotional, to the point where she cannot hide her emotions during a poker game. She loved her grandfather dearly and is angered when people call her grandfather a fool. She fell in love with Sora due to the pledges forcing her to, and she often has violent outbursts to try to break free of it. She loves her kingdom and the world and believes in the potential of Imanity.
searchTerms: ステファニー・ドーラ

name: Wenge Kong
description: Wenge Kong (nicknamed China by everyone else) is an extremely skilled table tennis player who travelled to Japan to start anew after he was kicked out of his home team in China. Originally his intention was to beat the local hero 'Dragon', but he finds new worthy opponents after meeting Peco and Smile.

name: Shoutarou Kaneda
description: Kaneda is a carefree gang-leader who boasts a custom-modified motorcycle. He and Tetsuo have been best friends since early childhood. He is brash and not above teasing Tetsuo despite feeling affection for him as a younger brother. Upon rescuing Kei, Kaneda becomes involved in the activities of her group of anti-government guerillas in hopes of locating Tetsuo.

name: Mio
description: She is previously referred to​ as the Black Spider of Calamity and is a unique existence in the Goddess' World. She is presently in servitude of Makoto. She can be single-minded and straightforward in her loyalty to Makoto to the point that it reaches a dangerous level. She has no qualms about destroying anyone who intends to do harm to Makoto.
mediaTitles: Tsuki ga Michibiku Isekai Douchuu 3rd Season
searchTerms: Tsuki ga Michibiku Isekai Douchuu 3rd Season

name: Miia
description: __Species:__ Lamia She is the first to arrive in Kimihito's ward when the cultural exchange began. She is sweet, naive, and a carefree individual. She has a habit of being clingy when she sleeps. She's very ticklish when one holds the very tip of her tail, which is why Kimihito exploit that weakness in order to get out of her grip.
mediaTitles: Monster Musume: Everyday Life With Monster Girls
Monster Musume: Everyday Life With Monster Girls OVA

Monster Musume: Everyday Life With Monster Girls OVA

name: Lisa Lisa
description: __Birthday:__ ~!Dec, 1888!~ __Age:__ ~!50!~ __Height:__ 175 cm A mysterious Ripple user whom Joseph Joestar meets in Venice, Lisa Lisa reveals herself to be his friend Caesar Zeppeli's mentor. She trains Joseph in the ways of the Ripple and joins in the fight against the Pillar Men, as a powerful Ripple user in her own right. ~!It is eventually revealed that she is Joseph's long-lost mother, despite her youthful appearance. Her real name is Elisabeth Joestar and she is the infant Jonathan Joesta
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 2: Battle Tendency
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 2: Battle Tendency

name: Mari Makinami Illustrious
nativeName: 真希波・マリ・イラストリアス
description: Mari Makinami Illustrious is an Evangelion pilot introduced into the franchise during the second installment of the four part theatrical remake series, Rebuild of Evangelion. Little is known about her as of yet except that she is the pilot of the Provisional Evangelion Unit-05 which differs from previous incarnations drastically featuring four mechanical "legs" that end in wheels and a lack of hands which have been replaced with a jousting lance and "claw". Because of it's unique design, Mari pi
searchTerms: 真希波・マリ・イラストリアス

name: Miyo Saimori
description: Eldest daughter of the Saimori family. Her mother died when she was young. She is ungifted ~!Later it was revealed that she is actually gifted, her gift was sealed away by her mother before her death. She has the gift of Dream-Sight!~
mediaTitles: My Happy Marriage: The Shape of My Happiness
searchTerms: My Happy Marriage: The Shape of My Happiness

name: Gesicht
description: He attempts to capture a powerful killer in Germany who is attacking both humans and robots with no apparent motives. In the original manga, Gesicht's name was Gerhart, and in the 1980's anime his name was Zeron. In Pluto, he along with his wife and the other robots in the story are given a human appearance - contradictory to his prior robot appearances in both the manga and 1980 series.

name: Seika Ijichi
description: Nijika's older sister and manager of the live house "STARRY".

name: Irisviel von Einzbern
nativeName: アイリスフィール・フォン・アインツベルン
description: __Height:__ 158 cm Irisviel von Einzbern is the partner of Saber as well as the intended vessel for the Holy Grail. She is the mother of Illyasviel von Einzbern. Like her daughter, Irisviel is a homunculus, an artificial being created by the Einzbern. She was raised to be a puppet with no desires, but found happiness in her existence when she gave birth to Illyasviel. She is married to Kiritsugu Emiya, the biological father of her daughter.
searchTerms: アイリスフィール・フォン・アインツベルン

name: Kiyoomi Sakusa
description: Itachiyama Academy's second-year ace and one of the top three aces of Japan. He is calm and collected, yet very competitive and proud. He's also a germaphobe, often wearing a mask when not playing volleyball. ~!He eventually became an outside hitter for the MSBY Black Jackals, a V-League Division 1 team. He became a member of Japan's National team during the 2021 Olympics.!~
mediaTitles: Haikyu!!: Special One-Shot - A Party Reignited
searchTerms: Haikyu!!: Special One-Shot - A Party Reignited

name: Penelope Eckhart
description: Penelope is the adoptive daughter of the Eckhart family. The protagonist, Siyeon Cha, transmigrates into Penelope's body after struggling with the Hard Mode of the game Daughter of the Duke - Love Project! and falling asleep. After years of abuse, the protagonist has become a cold-hearted and independent person. She can also be very sarcastic.

name: Subaru Awa
description: __Height:__ 158 cm A girl who attends an entertainment school. She's appeared in commercials and has a promising future ahead of her. She is a beautiful girl who could become a model, and is good at socialising and is very graceful. But, inside she is actually strong-willed and competitive.
